title: scrophularia balbisii subsp. cinerea
intro: Scrophularia balbisii subsp. cinerea, a plant species within the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae), is also known as gray scrophularia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Scrophularia balbisii subsp. cinerea are said to include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation. Scrophularia balbisii subsp. cinerea is used in traditional herbal preparations, often in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide a range of therapeutic benefits.
